workspace.noFiles: No files exposed by the native API yet.

wiki.choosePage: Choose a page from the exposed wiki tree.

sources.title: Raw Sources
sources.readOnlyNotice: Import and delete are disabled because the native HTTP API only exposes source listing, text reads, and rescan.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.openProject: Open a project to view the graph
graph.buildingFullGraph: Building full graph from {{count}} wiki pages...
graph.importSourcesHint: Import sources to start building the knowledge graph
graph.maxLinksHint: Hide nodes above this link count
graph.showingStats: Showing {{pages}} of {{total}} pages and {{links}} of {{totalLinks}} links.

lint.title: Wiki Lint
lint.heading: Run lint to check wiki health
lint.autoFixDisabled: Fix and Open & Edit are disabled because the API does not expose write operations.

missingIndex.title: Missing index
missingIndex.detail: The exposed wiki tree does not include wiki/index.md.

emptyPage.title: Empty page
emptyPage.detail: This page is empty or could not be loaded through the API.

missingH1.title: Missing H1
missingH1.detail: This page has no Markdown H1 heading.

danglingWikilink.title: Possible dangling wikilink
danglingWikilink.detail: [[{{link}}]] does not match a currently exposed Markdown filename.

chat.name: Chat
chat.reason: LLM Wiki 0.6 exposes a non-streaming chat API; WebUI support is intentionally deferred for a separate design pass.

projectCreation.name: Project creation
projectCreation.reason: Creating projects currently depends on native Tauri dialog and filesystem commands that are not exposed through the HTTP API.

sourceImportDelete.name: Source import/delete
sourceImportDelete.reason: The API can list sources and trigger a rescan, but import/delete operations are native-only today.

wikiEditing.name: Wiki editing and auto-fix
wikiEditing.reason: The HTTP API intentionally exposes read-only file content; write endpoints are not available.

deepResearch.name: Deep Research
deepResearch.reason: Deep Research orchestration lives in the original WebView and has no non-invasive HTTP endpoint yet.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.notice: This WebUI is intentionally non-invasive. All project data comes through the native LLM Wiki HTTP API or the Docker proxy.
